title: Merkelized Alternative Script Trees (MAST)
description: MAST commits to multiple Bitcoin Script spending branches in a Merkle tree while revealing only the branch used to spend. It reduces revealed policy and witness data without hiding the committed alternatives from verification.

resources.title: Bitcoin Dev Project: MAST explained simply
resources.notes: Short learner-facing explanation of Merkleized Alternative Script Trees.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Topic: MAST
resources.notes: Technical context for script-tree commitments and selective branch revelation.

resources.title: Programming Bitcoin
resources.notes: Worked background on Bitcoin scripts, hashing, and Merkle commitments.
